headings.usage: Hero headers, section titles, card headers.

body.usage: Data tables, chart labels, body text. Excellent tabular numerals.

utilities.tabular_nums: Always apply `tabular-nums` class to tables, KPI values, and charts.

hero.layout: Overlapping crystalline panels on `#FDFBF6`. Soft radial glows of cyan and pomegranate in the background.
hero.text: Outfit font, `text-5xl` tracking-tight, clinical_blue to turquoise gradient text clip.

pricing_cards.base: Use glass_card_1. On hover, translate-y-1, switch to glass_card_2, and animate a subtle glow behind it.

clinical_dashboard.kpi_sparklines: col-span-12 md:col-span-4 lg:col-span-3. Use raw SVG for sparklines (lightweight). Include % change, tabular-num.
clinical_dashboard.chart_library: Recharts. Use `<ReferenceArea>` for normal ranges (filled with turquoise-50/40).
clinical_dashboard.abnormality_heatmap: Grid of small rounded squares (github style) showing test frequency/abnormalities. Use Pomegranate for critical, Cyan for normal.
clinical_dashboard.density_toggle: Tabs component to switch between Patient (high padding, explanations) and Specialist (dense tables, p-2 padding).

motion_specs.page_load: staggered fade-up (`framer-motion`), initial opacity 0, y 20, duration 0.5s

rtl_adaptation.icons: Use `rtl:-scale-x-100` for directional icons (chevrons, arrows) from lucide-react.
rtl_adaptation.dir_attribute: Wrap main app in `<div dir="rtl">` for Arabic, `<div dir="ltr">` for English.

tailwind_config.colors: Add turquoise, pomegranate, and clinical_blue exactly as defined.
